title: I wrung you yesterday,
content:
I wrung you yesterday,
some million-odd years ago.
Your answer familiar;
my question, also so.
I miss your snide remarks,
your crooked lower tooth.
You miss?--
Nothing. No one.
Never your mind worry.

A lesson taught, never
learned. Stickiest ideas oft
offer no thing crueler
than Severest winters--
Yet, how quick I am, grab
My scarf, my coat, how quick
I ignore a sun-blessed
Reflection:
Step
Time
Step,
I
walk
in thru
the past.
context: From document: I wrung you yesterday,
